SPS DECODER LIBRARY (SPStudio_Dev) v5.2 SOURCE CODE release package

This software is not free for commercial use; please read the licence.

This distribution contains the source code and documentation for the 
SPS DECODER LIBRARY v5.2 for Windows(tm), macOS (tm) and Linux. 
Detailed documentation about using, compiling and development can
be found in the CAPSLib* PDF file in this package.

If you encounter any problems, please let us know by posting here:
https://forum.kryoflux.com

Please use the forums for bug reports, do not submit tickets for this.

Thank you for your support,
The Software Preservation Society
